home.tagline: Residential and commercial plumbing with clear communication and careful work. Same-day and emergency scheduling when available.
home.areasBody: Based in the 818 area, we routinely serve the San Fernando Valley and nearby Los Angeles County communities.

services.heading: Services
services.lead: Scope and pricing are confirmed on site or after photos and a short phone consult. If we are not the right fit, we say so early.
services.footnote: Not all work is available in every jurisdiction. Permits, inspections, and specialty trades are coordinated as required.

groups.title: Fixtures and appliances
items: Laundry boxes and ice maker lines

groups.title: Gas plumbing
items: Gas line sizing and installation where licensed and permitted

serviceAreas.heading: Service areas
serviceAreas.lead: Dispatch is centered on the San Fernando Valley (818). Nearby Los Angeles County cities are often available; longer drive times may affect scheduling windows.
serviceAreas.citiesNote: List is illustrative, not exhaustive. Call with your address to confirm availability and same-day options.
serviceAreas.mapPlaceholder: Map placeholder — drop in an embedded coverage map here.

about.heading: About
about.intro: {business} focuses on predictable scheduling, tidy job sites, and options explained in plain language before work begins.
values: Permits pulled when code requires it
Respect for your time and property
about.credentialsBody: Add license numbers, bonding, insurance carrier, and years in business here when provided by ownership. This block is intentionally plain so legal and marketing can drop in final copy without fighting layout.
about.whyLead: Four habits that make our jobs run smoother than the next plumber's.

whyItems.title: On-time arrivals
whyItems.body: Tight scheduling windows and a call-ahead before we roll up.

whyItems.title: Clean work areas
whyItems.body: Floor protection, drop cloths, and a real walk-through at clean-up.

whyItems.title: Plain-language quotes
whyItems.body: We explain options and trade-offs before we touch a wrench.

whyItems.title: Stand-behind work
whyItems.body: If something we did fails early, we come back and make it right.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Fastest response is a phone call. For non-urgent questions, the form on this page reaches us by email.
contact.hoursBody: Replace with real dispatch hours and emergency policy. If you offer 24/7 emergency, state how after-hours fees are quoted.
contact.mailBody: Add a mailing address or P.O. box for customers and vendors. Keeping this separate from the phone block preserves layout when the design team applies branding.
contact.note: {business} — fast response on real plumbing jobs. The form below sends straight to our dispatch inbox.

form.heading: Send a message
form.lead: Tell us what's going on. Photos, addresses, and a short description help us quote faster.
form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks — we got it. We'll be in touch shortly.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please call us instead.
form.errorRequired: Please fill in the required fields.
form.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

process.heading: From your call to the all-clear
process.lead: Four steps. No surprises. We tell you what we found, what it costs, and what changes — before we start.

call.title: 1. Call or message
call.body: Tell us what's wrong. We'll triage urgency and book the next available slot.

diagnose.title: 2. On-site diagnosis
diagnose.body: We arrive, isolate the issue, and walk you through findings with photos when it helps.

fix.title: 3. Quoted, then fixed
fix.body: Written quote with clear options. Once you approve, we get to work and keep the site tidy.

guarantee.title: 4. Tested & guaranteed
guarantee.body: Final tests, walk-through, and a stand-behind promise on the workmanship.

cta.heading: Burst pipe, no hot water, backed-up drain — call us.
cta.body: Same-day visits when available. Real humans answering during business hours.

beforeAfter.heading: We leave it cleaner than we found it
beforeAfter.body: Drag the slider to see how a typical job comes together — from rough to finished, the work site stays under control.
beforeAfter.bullet1: Floors and counters protected on day one
beforeAfter.bullet2: Old fittings hauled out, debris cleared
beforeAfter.bullet3: Final walk-through before we collect payment
beforeAfter.imageAlt: Before and after of a Cobra Plumbing job — placeholder

gallery.heading: Real jobs, real results
gallery.body: A mix of finished installs, the rough conditions we sometimes inherit, and shots of how we keep work areas clean while jobs are in flight.
gallery.placeholderNote: Image placeholders — swap in real job-site photos under public/photos/.

items.rough-1: Old corroded line discovered behind drywall
items.clean-bay: Workbench staged and labeled before install
items.fixture-install: Fixture install — drop cloth and tools laid out

items.quote: Showed up on time, told us what was wrong, fixed it the same afternoon. Place was cleaner when they left than when they got here.
items.author: Maria G.

items.quote: Quoted three options before they started — no surprises on the final bill. Will call them again.
items.author: Daniel R.

items.quote: Fast response on a leak that was about to cost us a kitchen remodel. Highly recommended.
items.author: Karen P.

items.quote: Honest, fair, and they actually picked up the phone after hours. That's rare.
items.author: Aaron L.
